creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This looks a lot like a hardware error.  If you're convinced 
that it is not a failing disk, please send the output 
of the dmesg(8) utility to <freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org> 
using the subject line of this message. 

This will assist the maintainer of the ata(4) driver. 
However, my money's on a bad disk. :-(
